channel.title: GitHub LLVM Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of LLVM in GitHub

item.title: llvm/llvm-project
item.description: The LLVM Project is a collection of modular and reusable compiler and toolchain technologies.

item.title: intel/llvm
item.description: Intel staging area for llvm.org contribution. Home for Intel LLVM-based projects.

item.title: KomiMoe/Arkari
item.description: Yet another llvm based obfuscator based on goron.

item.title: llvm/clangir
item.description: A new (MLIR based) high-level IR for clang.
